overall.description: A third-person perspective video game scene showing a cowboy character exploring a rural farmhouse during an overcast, rainy afternoon. The character walks along the exterior of a green wooden house, steps onto the porch, and stops to smoke a cigarette while overlooking the pastoral landscape with mountains in the distance.

agents.ego_description: walking along the grassy side of a green wooden farmhouse, passing trees and barrels

entered.detail: two-story green wooden house with white trim and shutters
tall green grass with wildflowers alongside the house
narrow dirt trail running alongside the farmhouse
mountain range visible under dark storm clouds
large deciduous tree with dense green foliage
weathered wooden barrels stacked against the house wall

segments.scene_description: The character walks along the exterior of a green wooden farmhouse through tall grass. The rural landscape features distant mountains under dark storm clouds, with wooden barrels and a leafy tree visible near the house.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered farmhouse porch with white railings

events.description: steps from grass onto wooden porch of the farmhouse

agents.ego_description: walking along the wooden porch, passing barrels and a wooden cart, approaching the corner of the house

entered.detail: weathered wooden deck with ramp leading up to the entrance
white painted wooden railing along the porch edge
fenced garden plot with rows of crops
wooden barn structure visible in the distance
old wooden wagon with red wheels parked near the garden
wicker basket with trailing green plants hanging from porch roof

segments.scene_description: The character steps onto the wooden porch of the farmhouse, moving from the exposed grass to the sheltered deck. The porch features white railings and hanging plants, with views of a vegetable garden and distant barn becoming visible.

scene_state.functional_zone: farmhouse porch corner overlooking rural valley

events.description: character stops walking and leans against porch railing at the corner
character takes out a cigarette and lights it, beginning to smoke

agents.ego_description: standing at the porch corner smoking a cigarette and looking out over the rural landscape with mountains and farmland

entered.detail: green metal water tower visible in the distance behind the farm
white wooden picket fence enclosing the garden area
another wooden house visible in the far distance across the field

segments.scene_description: The character stops at the porch corner to smoke a cigarette while the camera pans across the rural landscape. The view encompasses the vegetable garden, white picket fences, a distant water tower, and mountains under stormy skies, with the farmhouse now behind the character.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement that transitions from a walk through the damp exterior of a farmhouse to a stationary, panoramic view of a stormy rural landscape. It begins with the character moving through tall grass beside a green wooden house, passing wooden barrels and a leafy tree under dark storm clouds. As the character steps from the exposed grass onto the sheltered wooden porch, the perspective shifts to reveal white railings, hanging plants, and a glimpse of a nearby vegetable garden. The scene then opens further as the character stops at the porch corner to smoke, with the camera panning away from the house to encompass white picket fences and a distant water tower. Finally, the view expands across the wide pastoral valley toward the mountains looming under the heavy, overcast sky.
